name: caveman-mode
description: Switch reply style between normal caveman, ultra caveman, and off.

interface.shortDescription: Switch between normal, ultra, and off.
interface.longDescription: Adds quick style-switch skills for concise caveman replies, stronger ultra compression, or turning the style off.
defaultPrompt: Use caveman-mode:ultra for shorter replies in this chat.
Use caveman-mode:normal for concise replies without heavy compression.
Use caveman-mode:off and reply normally again.
